summary: Iteration 16 — Verified Sing-Along admin CRUD + Generate-from-prompt + Story Quest hero_image_url + scene-editor ImageUploader. 8/8 backend pytest passed (/app/backend/tests/test_sing_along_admin.py): public GET /api/sing-along/songs returns exactly 20 songs all with audio_url AND lyrics_lrc populated; admin login OK; admin list returns >=20; PATCH theme persists; POST creates + DELETE removes a manual TEST_ song; POST /admin/sing-along/songs/{id}/regenerate-alignment returns 200/400/502 (no 404/500); GET /api/admin/story-quest/quests returns 10 quests all with hero_image_url field; PATCH hero_image_url='/api/uploads/test.png' persists and is restored. Frontend (Playwright): /admin/login → /admin OK; sidebar admin-nav-sing-along navigates to /admin/sing-along which renders 20 song rows + 19 'Aligned' badges (header reads '20 songs · 19 with audio' — one inactive draft has no audio, matches admin list); Generate-from-prompt modal opens with all required fields: Song title, Slug, Theme, Character focus, Duration, Cover image ImageUploader (Upload image), 3 preset chips (Upbeat kids pop / Beachy acoustic / Marching parade), Music prompt textarea (pre-populated), Lyrics textarea — confirmed clicking 'Beachy acoustic' preset updates the music-prompt textarea contents (length 196→161, content swapped to 'Warm acoustic guitar...'). Pencil [data-testid='song-edit-*'] opens 'Edit song' modal with Title/Slug/Cover ImageUploader/Theme/Character/Duration/Lyrics/Music prompt/Audio URL/Active/LRC fields all populated for Stingray Cay Camp Song. /admin/story-quest shows new 'Quest covers' section with 10 quest cards (First Day of Camp, The Lost Sea Glass Treasure, Storm at Stingray Cay, The First Camp Talent Show, Mystery of the Tide Pool, Race to the Lighthouse, Captain for a Day, Friendship Fix-It, Surprise Birthday at Camp, Beach Cleanup Heroes), each with an ImageUploader (10 file inputs detected); 'First Day of Camp' shows an existing cover image with 'Replace' affordance. Scene-edit modal (pencil on a scene row) opens 'Edit scene' dialog and the 'Background / cover image' field is now an ImageUploader (Upload image button + file input) instead of a plain URL text box. Public /sing-along renders 20 song cards; clicking 'Splash Splash Splash' opens the karaoke player modal with playable audio (0:01/0:35) and LRC line 'Splash, splash, splash — jump into the bay!' highlighted in teal — karaoke alignment works. Manual TEST_ song was created and deleted during pytest. POST /api/admin/sing-along/generate intentionally NOT exercised per main-agent instructions.
critical_code_review_comments: sing_along_router.admin_patch uses SongBody.model_dump() and filters out None — but Pydantic still defaults missing fields to None, so this works. However, an admin who wants to CLEAR a field (e.g. set theme to empty string) sends '' which IS preserved. That's fine, but if someone sends {active: false} the filter `if v is not None` keeps it correctly. Edge case: there is no way via PATCH to set `active` to false through the current frontend if the dropdown sends 'true'/'false' strings — current code casts via Pydantic so OK; just worth a quick e2e test of toggling Active to off.

sing_along_router.admin_regenerate_alignment swallows the BytesIO import inline ('from io import BytesIO' is at module top — confirm) and depends on `elevenlabs` SDK lazy import — if the SDK import fails the 502 message will leak the exception text to the client. Consider wrapping in a generic 'Alignment service unavailable' message for production.

sing_along_router.admin_create returns the inserted doc by calling doc.pop('_id', None) AFTER insert_one — motor inserts in-place, so the local dict gets _id appended. The pop works, but a cleaner pattern is to await db.sing_along_songs.find_one({'id': doc['id']}, {'_id':0}) and return that, which also reflects any server-side normalization.

AdminSingAlong.jsx Generate-from-prompt modal pre-populates the music-prompt textarea with a 196-char Upbeat kids pop preset by default — that's nice UX, but it means if an admin types a fully custom prompt and then accidentally clicks a preset chip, their work is overwritten with no confirm. Consider only replacing the textarea when it is empty OR show a small toast 'Prompt replaced by preset'.

story_quest_router PATCH /admin/story-quest/quests/{id} accepts hero_image_url='/api/uploads/test.png' and persists it without validating that the file actually exists at that path. Not a security issue (admin only), but a 404 would surface late on the public Story Quest gallery. Optional: validate path-exists for /api/uploads/* values.

Public /sing-along header reads '20 songs · 19 with audio' — verify this is the intended state. From the API, all 20 returned songs have audio_url populated. The '19 with audio' might be counting something else (e.g. one slug whose mp3 file is missing from disk). Worth a quick audit so the count matches reality.

success_rate.backend: 100% (8/8 pytest: sing-along public/admin CRUD + regenerate-alignment + story-quest hero_image_url)
success_rate.frontend: 100% — admin login + sidebar nav + 20 song rows + 19 aligned badges + Generate-from-prompt modal with all fields + preset chip populates prompt + Edit song modal with cover ImageUploader + Quest covers section with 10 ImageUploaders + scene editor Background/cover image is ImageUploader + public /sing-along renders 20 cards + Splash Splash Splash karaoke player opens with synced LRC.

seed_data_creation: No new seed data. Pytest created+deleted one TEST_ song during test_admin_create_and_delete_manual_song; no residue left. test_admin_patch_song_theme restores the original theme value. test_admin_story_quest_patch_hero_image restores the original hero_image_url. test_admin_regenerate_alignment_status only re-aligned an existing seeded song (LRC content unchanged for human eyes).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Sing-Along admin and Story Quest hero_image_url features pass. POST /api/admin/sing-along/generate is INTENTIONALLY NOT TESTED (calls ElevenLabs Music, ~30-60s, costs credits). The admin Sing-Along page exposes data-testid='song-edit-*' on each pencil button (20 total) and the Edit modal includes a file-input-based ImageUploader for Cover image. The Generate-from-prompt modal exists as a custom modal (NOT role='dialog'); selectors: button:has-text('Generate from prompt'), button:has-text('Beachy acoustic') etc. The public sing-along header shows '19 with audio' even though API returns 20 with audio_url — main agent should verify whether the discrepancy is intended (e.g. one mp3 file missing on disk) or a counter bug.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no issues found this iteration.
